name: Veles Finance Agent
description: AI-powered research and data-analytics tool: SEC 10-K extraction, public-filing risk summaries, Kelly Criterion calculator, and general finance Q&A. Informational and educational purposes only — not investment advice.

endpoints.description: Full LangGraph agent: routes to all tools, supports multi-turn history.
Automated risk-factor summary compiled from public filings and market data.
SEC EDGAR 10-K annual report extraction with parsed financials.
General financial question answered by Veles Finance 7B model.
Kelly Criterion calculator (standard quantitative formula): full and half-Kelly percentages. Informational, not a trade recommendation.
